form:Form.name: NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Legajo.filter.form

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' {%?(number(#SOURCE:@maxsize)>0) {% maxsize {%= 1+#SOURCE:@maxsize %} %} {% %} %} SELECT EMP.d_empresa as em, LEG.oi_personal_emp as id, LEG.e_numero_legajo as le, SEC.policy FROM PER01_PERSONAL as PER, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as LEG, ORG03_EMPRESAS as EMP, LIQ07_PERSONAL AS LIQ07, LIQ22_BANCOS_SUCUR AS SUC, LIQ22_BANCOS AS BANCO, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.LegajoEmpresa.PERSONAL_EMP\') as SEC JOIN PER.oi_personal INNER LEG.oi_personal, LEG.oi_empresa INNER EMP.oi_empresa, LEG.oi_personal_emp INNER LIQ07.oi_personal_emp, LIQ07.oi_sucursal INNER SUC.oi_sucursal, SUC.oi_banco INNER BANCO.oi_banco, LEG.oi_personal_emp LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE 1=1 {%?(#SOURCE:@activos='1') {% and LEG.oi_indic_activo= \'1\' %} {% %} %} {%?(#SOURCE:@empresa!='') {% and LEG.oi_empresa = {#SOURCE:@empresa} %} {% %} %} {%?(#SOURCE:@oi_banco!='') {% and BANCO.oi_banco = {#SOURCE:@oi_banco} %} {% %} %} {%?(#SOURCE:@oi_sucursal!='') {% and SUC.oi_sucursal = {#SOURCE:@oi_sucursal} %} {% %} %} {%?(#SOURCE:@where!='') {% and {%=#SOURCE:@where %} %} {% %} %}
ORDER BY em ASC, le ASC ')/ROWS/ROW
